#  Intel® Xeon® Processors 
Performance where it matters. Efficiency where it counts.
[See product specs](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/ark.html#@PanelLabel595)
![Intel Xeon logo with glowing background](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/intel-xeon-6-badge-glow:680-680?ts=1779199003282&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1)
##  Intel® Xeon® Processors 
[ Processors ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/xeon/all.html#processors)
[ Workloads ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/xeon/all.html#workloads)
[ Stories ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/xeon/all.html#stories)
[ Specifications ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/xeon/all.html#specifications)
[ Resources ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/xeon/all.html#resources)
[ See product specs ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/ark.html#@PanelLabel595)
* * *
##  Purpose‑built for efficient, modern workloads 
##  Data Center 
Deliver the performance, efficiency, and flexibility needed to power AI, HPC, and general‑purpose workloads on a single, scalable platform.
[Intel® Xeon® 6 with P-core processors](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/xeon.html) [5th Gen Intel® Xeon® processors](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/docs/processors/xeon/5th-gen-xeon-scalable-processors.html) [Intel® Xeon® CPU Max series](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/xeon/max-series.html)
![Intel Xeon 6 processor front view](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/intel-xeon-p-cores-1080x1080:680-680?ts=1777585387026&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1)
##  Network and Edge 
Optimized to unlock new levels across a wide range of workloads while improving efficiency and lowering power consumption.
[Intel® Xeon® 6+](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/xeon/6-plus-series.html) [Intel® Xeon® 6 with E-core processors](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/xeon/6-e-core-series.html) [Intel® Xeon® 6 SoC](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/xeon/edge.html)
![Xeon® 6 processor with connecters at top and bottom](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/intel-xeon-e-cores-1080x1080:680-680?ts=1777585385830&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1)
##  Entry-Level Server 
Delivers business‑ready performance, reliability, and expandability at an accessible scale.
[Intel® Xeon® 6 for Entry-Level Server](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/xeon/entry.html)
![Xeon® processor with tabs on sides product photo](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/intel-xeon-els-1080x1080:680-680?ts=1777585386358&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1)
##  Workstation 
Built with exceptional scalability and reliability for compute-intensive tasks such as 3D rendering, simulation, and complex data analysis.
[Intel® Xeon® 6 processors for Workstation](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/xeon/workstations.html)
![Intel Xeon 6 processor close-up front view](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/intel-xeon-e-cores-1080x1080:680-680?ts=1777585385830&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1)
* * *
##  Technology solutions for businesses, big and small 
## [ AI  Boost performance without additional hardware to improve ROI for natural language processing, machine learning, and other core workloads. View AI solutions  ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/artificial-intelligence/overview.html)
## [ HPC  Handle demanding workloads and ever-increasing dataset sizes with solutions that are optimized for the most popular AI models and frameworks. View HPC solutions  ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/high-performance-computing/overview.html)
## [ Security  Protect critical systems and data with built-in security, manufactured and maintained according to industry-leading security practices. View security solutions  ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/security/overview.html)
## [ Cloud  Deliver cost-effective performance for a range of use cases in order to meet the challenges of a quickly changing digital landscape while optimizing your IT spend. View cloud solutions  ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/cloud-computing/overview.html)
## [ Network and Edge  Enhance efficiency and adapt to changing trends while managing risk and total cost of ownership (TCO) using our practical edge-to-cloud innovations. View network and edge solutions  ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/telecommunications/overview.html)
* * *
##  See how organizations are scaling with Intel Xeon 
## [ Kamiwaza boosts weather preparedness across sectors  Kamiwaza, Chief Meteorologist, and GAI, leverage Intel® Xeon® 6 and Intel® Gaudi® 3 to bolster weather event preparedness. Read the story  ![KAMIWAZA logo](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/kamiwaza-logo-1080x1080:680-680?ts=1777572884426&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1) ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/customer-spotlight/stories/kamiwaza-customer-story.html)
## [ Devito Codes automates HPC code generation  Devito Codes with Intel® Xeon® 6 processors generates optimized HPC code and enables finite difference solutions. Read the story  ![Devito logo](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/devito-codes-logo-1080x1080:680-680?ts=1777572884963&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1) ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/customer-spotlight/stories/devito-codes-customer-story.html)
## [ NTT DATA Group speeds sustainability initiatives  NTT DATA Group testing of Intel Xeon processors for enterprise applications advances sustainability management initiatives. Read the story  ![NTT DATA logo](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/ntt-data-logo-1080x1080:680-680?ts=1777572885441&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1) ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/customer-spotlight/stories/ntt-data-group-customer-story.html)
##  Intel Xeon processor specifications 
See detailed specs for current and previous‑generation Intel Xeon processors.
[View product specs](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/ark.html#@PanelLabel595)
##  Resources

[ Intel Xeon 6 for Entry Server product brief ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/content-details/845775/intel-xeon-6-for-entry-server-product-brief.html)
[ Resource & Documentation Center ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/resources-documentation/developer.html)

[ 5th Gen Intel® Xeon® processors product brief ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/docs/processors/xeon/5th-gen-xeon-product-brief.html)
